document_summary: This exhibit is the 'About Us' page from Umeng+'s website, describing the company as the domestic leading third-party intelligent provider of multidomain data. Umeng+ (Beijing Ruixun Lingtong Technology Co., Ltd.) has served 2.3 million mobile applications and 9.5 million websites over ten years, holds over sixty intellectual property rights, and obtained ISO/IEC 27001 and ISO/IEC 27018 certifications. The document establishes the credibility and market significance of Umeng+ as the sponsor of the Data Awards.

snippets.text: # Umen \(+\) , the Domestic Leading Third-party Intelligent Provider of Multidomain Data
snippets.subject: Umeng+
snippets.reasoning: Title establishing Umeng+ as the domestic leading third-party data provider, supporting the credibility of the Data Awards they sponsor.

snippets.text: Up to Jun. 2021, Umen \(+\) has provided professional data services over ten years for accumulative 2.3 million mobile applications and 9.5 million websites, covering 191 industry categories and outputting more than 300 analytical indicators for applications or industries. The typical customers are including CCTV, the Client- end of People's Daily, Toutiao, Himalaya, Chang Ba, Quick Hand, Easyhome, Intime Department Store, and so on.
snippets.subject: Umeng+
snippets.reasoning: Quantitative proof of Umeng+'s market dominance: 2.3 million apps, 9.5 million websites, major clients like CCTV and People's Daily, establishing them as a credible award sponsor.

snippets.text: So far, Umeng+ has over sixty intellectual property rights, and owns the Information System Security Level- 3 Assurance Certificate issued by the Ministry of Public Security.
snippets.subject: Umeng+
snippets.reasoning: Umeng+ holds over 60 intellectual property rights and a Level-3 security certificate from the Ministry of Public Security, showing its technological and regulatory standing.

snippets.text: Umen \(+\) (Beijing Ruixun Lingtong Technology Co., Ltd.), with the mission of "data intelligence, drives the growth of business", is based on outstanding technologies and computing algorithm capabilities, combines with real- time multidomain data resources, provides Internet enterprises with statistical analysis, operation, and technological effective improvement tools, and provides brand owners with online and offline digital intelligent marketing services, to assist the business in continuous growth.
snippets.subject: Umeng+
snippets.reasoning: Description of Umeng+'s core business and capabilities in data intelligence, providing context for their authority to evaluate and recognize data industry leaders.
